subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Ayat-i-Qayyumu'l-Asma (Commentary on a Verse from the Qayyumu'l-Asma)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath ordained that the Line, proceeding from the Primal Point manifested in the letter Bá, be the ornament of the seal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل الخط المتکون من النقطه الاولیه الظاهره بالباء طراز الختم
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
